ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., marathon, half-marathon, 5K) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizing entity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Fee for registering in the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "is_registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is open */,
  "course_map_url" TEXT /* URL to the course map */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runners" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the runner */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the runner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the runner */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the runner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the runner (M/F) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the runner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the runner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the runner */,
  "shirt_size" TEXT /* T-shirt size for the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the runner was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the runner is registered for */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the runner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the runner registered for the event */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "is_elite_runner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the runner is an elite runner */,
  "start_wave" TEXT /* Start wave assigned to the runner */,
  "chip_number" TEXT /* Chip number assigned to the runner for timing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result is for */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the runner */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the runner in the event */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace of the runner (e.g., 6:00 min/mile) */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON object containing split times at various points in the race */,
  "overall_place" INTEGER /* Overall place in the event */,
  "age_group_place" INTEGER /* Place in the age group */,
  "gender_place" INTEGER /* Place in the gender category */,
  "is_dnf" INTEGER /* Indicates if the runner did not finish (DNF) */,
  "is_dsq" INTEGER /* Indicates if the runner was disqualified (DSQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the runner resides */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the runner (e.g., 20-29, 30-39) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the runner */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the runner */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the runner */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the runner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_demographics_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_data" (
  "race_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race data entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "course_conditions" TEXT /* Course conditions during the event */,
  "start_temp" TEXT /* Temperature at the start of the event */,
  "end_temp" TEXT /* Temperature at the end of the event */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the event */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed during the event */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the event */,
  "elevation_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the message is related to */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner the message is sent to */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (e.g., Reminder, Announcement) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that sent the message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been read by the recipient */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time the message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
